description: Drone Rules apply to possession, leasing, operating, transferring or maintaining unmanned aircraft systems in India.
applies_to: All drone operators and owners in India

description: Drones are classified as Nano, Micro, Small, Medium and Large based on maximum all-up weight.
All drones must be registered on the Digital Sky platform and obtain a unique identification number.
Drones cannot operate in red or yellow zones without prior permission.
No person shall operate a drone without a valid remote pilot licence except exempted categories.
